raw_consumer_statement:
This is continuation or addition to complain CFPB complaint number XXXX I recently submitted a complaint regarding a dispute with American Express XXXX This is part of the dispute but specific to the money charged not the premise of the dispute i thought i would separate it. 

On XX/XX/year> using my American Express card i rented a XXXX  from XXXX XXXX a XXXX  for 24 hours. The cost of the rental for the 24 hrs was XXXX including taxes. Additionally a XXXX $ security deposit was also collected. 

On XX/XX/year> 5 days later XXXX XXXX a XXXX charged my American Express card XXXX. Although there was a significant lack of communication regarding the charge ( please refer to Complaint XXXX ) the charge was due to claimed damage from mud on the XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX emailed the details of the charges in their invoice along with screen shots of XXXX images of the cost of : paint, fenders, roof, and other. 

The total paid to XXXX XXXX a XXXX along with the original rental fee and security deposit was XXXX. 

The summary of charges and the total charged do not match up with a difference of around XXXX When I questioned XXXX XXXX a XXXX to account for the different simply : labor. 

American Express, and my self repeatedly asked XXXX XXXX a XXXX to a detailed itemized repair estimate from a body shop. I, to this date have never received the repair estimate, and American Express has communicated several times they did not as well. I do not know if they ever received it. 

American Express failed to address the discrepancy and ultimately after the insurance claim was denied ( which is when they were asking for the repair estimate ) and the dispute was closed ( without explanation to this writer ), we paid the full amount to American Express. 

Please see attached.
